character_buff.name: Swift Move
character_buff.description: Brisk walk using the power of wind. Move SPD increases, magic and Ranged Damage decreases. Increases damage by skill use in Swift Move status.

skills.name: Deep Straight
skills.description: Impales the enemy on a sword before delivering a powerful kick.

skills.name: Earth Tremor
skills.description: Plunges sword into enemy while airborne.

skills.name: Penta-Train
skills.description: A series of aggressive attacks that pushes the enemy back.

effects: Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]
Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]

skills.name: Vortex Slash
skills.description: Make a series of fast and powerful attacks.

skills.name: Crescent Moon
skills.description: Swings a sword in a moon-shaped arc to bring enemies down.

skills.name: Grind Cutter
skills.description: Swings a sabre in a powerful whirling motion.

skills.name: Rainbow Splasher
skills.description: Strongly and quickly strike down enemy 7 times.

skills.name: Triskelion
skills.description: Consecutive triple combo wind pressure attack.

skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 6m away and within 3m width

skills.description: A slashing attack to multiple enemies.

effects: Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]
Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]

skills.name: Tearing alternate
skills.description: Enemies feel as if their bodies are being torn apart by dimensional forces.

skills.name: Cross Slash
skills.description: Attack by crossing two swords.

skills.name: Ten Blades
skills.description: At incredible speeds, one sword attacks like 10.

skills.description: Cut twice with fast speed, kick, and deliver final blow.

skills.name: Charge
skills.description: Charges enemies down with a sword.

skills.name: Vertical Slash
skills.description: A powerful downward slash. It inflicts triple damage on large monsters and Double Damage on smaller ones.

skills.name: Skyliner
skills.description: Slashes across a group of enemies.

skills.name: Fury
skills.description: Maximises Attack SPD by using whole bodys energy. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Dread Worm
skills.description: Brandishes a sword in a sweeping motion, striking terror into the hearts of your enemies.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Genocide
skills.description: Advances upon enemies with 7 consecutive slashes.
